rulings.Case Title: TINOCO, ELVIRA AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEAR AND et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Apportion Proceeding And For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 12, 2016 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion to apportion proceeding and for order to distribute settlement funds is continued on the court's own motion to May 19, 2016. = (503/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN BROSNAN VS. CRANE CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 12, 2016 in Department 503, Line 2. Defendant Crane Co.'s motion for summary judgment, or in the alternative, summary adjudication is continued on the court's own motion to May 19, 2016. Defendant must deliver a courtesy copy of its reply to Department 503 by May 12, 2016 at 4:00p.m. = (503/GLW)
